title: Apache Kafka 4.3.0 Release Announcement
author: Mickael Maison
summary: Apache Kafka 4.3, a release powered by 25 new KIPs. Apache Kafka 4.3 includes first-class support for preserving record headers in Kafka Streams

title: Customer Intelligence Hub: A Single Pane of Glass for Customer Insight and Action
author: Vidya Peri
summary: Unify customer data with AI-powered insights. Customer Intelligence Hub helps GTM teams detect risk, uncover growth, and act faster with real-time context.

title: How to Add Your First Streaming Transformation with Flink
author: Mohtasham Sayeed Mohiuddin
summary: Learn how to add your first streaming transformation with Flink. A step-by-step Migration Lite guide to process, enrich, and scale data in real time.

title: Integrating RAG and GenAI into Customer 360 Architecture
author: Kartik Kaushik
summary: Learn how to integrate RAG and GenAI into a real-time Customer 360 architecture to power compliant, personalized, and AI-driven financial services experiences.

title: RAG and GenAI for Regulated and Public Sector Architectures
author: Laasya Krupa B
summary: Explore enterprise RAG and GenAI architectures for regulated and public sectors, with real-time data streaming, governance, and compliance built in.

title: Enterprise Knowledge Management with RAG for Digital-Native Companies
author: Bijoy Choudhury
summary: Learn how digital-native companies build enterprise knowledge management systems using RAG and real-time data streaming to power accurate, scalable AI assistants.

title: Autonomous Agentic Event-Driven Systems Architecture
author: Mohtasham Sayeed Mohiuddin
summary: Design autonomous, agentic event-driven systems using real-time data streaming to enable closed-loop AI decisioning, orchestration, and scalable automation.

title: Agentic Fleet Management Architecture for Real-Time Operations
author: Bijoy Choudhury
summary: Design an agentic fleet management architecture using real-time data streaming to optimize routing, maintenance, and autonomous decision-making at scale.

title: Proven: Up to 73% Fewer Brokers With Confluent Private Cloud – and More
author: Anjan Kumar B R
summary: Enforce encryption & governance centrally with Confluent Private Cloud. Reduce brokers by 73% and secure legacy Kafka clients without code changes or sprawl.

title: AI Tools for Builders — Confluent's MCP Server & Agent Skills

summary: Connect your AI coding assistant to Confluent with MCP servers and Agent Skills. Direct platform access and domain expertise for streaming, now generally available.
